programme.title: Wildest Africa: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
programme.desc: Mount Kenya soars over 5km into the air. It is the second highest mountain in Africa. At its summit, temperatures fluctuate from over 30 degrees celsius to below freezing.
programme.sub-title: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Colide
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Anne (Demi Moore) deals with life as a working mother and raising her teen, Lola, (Miley Cyrus) who seems to be growing up faster than expected.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: A father becomes worried when a local gangster befriends his son in the Bronx in the 1960s.

programme.title: Good Time Max
programme.desc: Suspenseful, twisty and starring award-winning James Franco (127 Hours). Meet brothers Adam and Max. Leading a successful medical career, Adam prescribes drugs, while hedonistic Max, deals drugs.

programme.title: Miss Meadows
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Miss Meadows is not entirely what she appears. Well-mannered, sweet, and caring; but underneath the candy-sweet exterior hides the soul of a vigilante, taking it upon herself to right the wrongs in this world by whatever means necessary.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: The story of the first major battle of the American phase of the Vietnam War, and the soldiers on both sides that fought it. Feat: Mel Gibson.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Overdrawn At The Memory Bank
programme.desc: A weather tech's mind gets trapped in a computer and Pearl establishes her own public television pledge program.

programme.title: Jungle Goddess
programme.desc: Jungle Goddess: An heiress stranded in Africa is made queen of the jungle in the feature film and Bela Lugosi stars in the short The Phantom Creeps.

programme.title: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: The Phantom Planet
programme.desc: When US astronaut Captain Frank Chapman’s military spaceship is damaged by asteroids, he lands safely on the giant asteroid Rheton.

programme.title: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: Outlaw of Gor
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: The Wild Wild World of Batwoman
programme.desc: In this lower-than-low budget film, Batwoman enlists her band of go-go dancing Batgirls to protect the Atomic Hearing Aid from the rotten Rat Fink.

programme.title: The Beatniks
programme.desc: When a hold-up carried out by his hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Crane’s bright future as a recording artist could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Unearthly
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates havoc when an experiment to stop the aging process goes awry.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.
programme.sub-title: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Duh'Rehka / Chore Leave
programme.desc: While chasing his gopher-nemesis, Sawyer gets zapped into his brain bin and emerges super smart!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler
programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!
programme.sub-title: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bird Brains / The Real Vincent
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch
programme.desc: When the campers try to reclaim their stolen Lakebottom items.
programme.sub-title: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.
programme.sub-title: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.
programme.sub-title: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.
programme.sub-title: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.
programme.sub-title: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home
programme.desc: The Campers and Buttsquat come across an ancient pyramid inhabited by mummy's.
programme.sub-title: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.
programme.sub-title: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt get super fantastic mega powers!
programme.sub-title: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B
programme.desc: Gretchen, McGee and Squirt get trapped by witch who forces the campers into pizza slave labour.
programme.sub-title: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Tooth Troll / Hive and Seek
programme.desc: Squirt is captured by a Tooth Troll!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.
programme.sub-title: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.
programme.sub-title: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slaybells / Smells Like Holidays
programme.desc: The kids almost ruin the biggest monster holiday of the year!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck
programme.desc: McGee signs a contract with Sheba the bandshee.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Butt-Squad / You Sank My Battle-Squirt!
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Hiccups / Boogeyman Fever
programme.desc: Things start disappearing around Lakebottom!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cheeks of Dread / Doo Doo Doomsday

programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Semi Truck Jump/Meal Worm Pit/Reverse Bungee With Paint Ball
programme.desc: A contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into a case with the contestants. Each contestant will hold a paint ball gun and be harnessed to a reverse bungee line.
programme.sub-title: Semi Truck Jump/Meal Worm Pit/Reverse Bungee With Paint Ball

programme.title: Fear Factor: Eat Buffalo Testicles/Pendulum Swing-Human Wrecking Ball/Submerged Car
programme.desc: Each contestant will be asked to eat two boiled buffalo testicles in 4 minutes. Each contestant will be harnessed and raised by crane. Each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is lowered by crane into water.
programme.sub-title: Eat Buffalo Testicles/Pendulum Swing-Human Wrecking Ball/Submerged Car

programme.title: Fear Factor: Net Jump/Worm Cocktail/Tunnel Crawl
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a one hundred and ten foot tower. Each contestant will be asked to eat 6 worms in 4 minutes. Each contestant will have to find their way through an underground tunnel.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submarine Dive/Cricket Eating/Slide For Life
programme.desc: Contestants swim under a boat collecting glow sticks along the way. Then a contestant will throw a dart, and the score they hit is the number of crickets they'll have to eat.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Power Pole/Pig Buffet/Traverse The Truck
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a 35 foot power pole, they must stand on top. Contestant will select a fortune cookie, each fortune is inscribed with a different pig part. The contestant stands on a skid at the back of a semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Jet Ski/Bowling For Beetles/Traverse Building
programme.desc: Contestants will pull themselves into the belly of the helicopter. A number of pins left standing will represent the number of live beetles each contestant will have to eat. A contestant has to climb on a rope that is over a hundred feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bus Surfing/Desert Hat/Swinging Square
programme.desc: Players stand on top of a moving Bus. Contestants spend three minutes with their head in the plexiglass box and creatures are dropped in. Contestants must walk the perimeter of a square made up of four twenty-foot sections of box truss.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Wing Walking/Safety Criteria/Bobbing Among Snakes
programme.desc: Contestant walks the wing of a bi-plane in flight. We fill a plexiglass basin with water, plums, ribbon and garter snakes, and one big albino snake. To jump a car off a two level parking structure with the furthest distance.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bull Riding/Eat Brains/Splash Down
programme.desc: Contestants must ride a bull for eight seconds. Each contestant eats poached cow's brain, served cold, and go the furthest distance after being ratcheted up with rope swinging down.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat To Boat Jump/Swimming With The Fishes/Flag Snag
programme.desc: Jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into a fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.
programme.sub-title: Boat To Boat Jump/Swimming With The Fishes/Flag Snag

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Fire Drill/Eat Rectum/Walking The Ledge
programme.desc: Players climb out over the skid and underneath the helicopter. Contestants shoot at target, determining the number of boiled pig rectums they will have to eat. Contestants must navigate around the ledge of a tall building.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Fire Drill/Eat Rectum/Walking The Ledge

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tight Rope/Flies/Ice Swim Part 2

programme.sub-title: Blimp Ladder Climb/Bobbing for Chicken Feet In A Barrel of Warxworms/Car Rollover

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Climb/Blender of Fear/Pole Hopper

programme.title: Fear Factor: Vertical Gauntlet/Rat Hat/Semi-Truck Rope Walk
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.desc: The second duel of the Fortune Cup is about to get under way as the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose finds herself having to face off against a medieval menace named Sir Randsborg.

programme.title: Dan in Real Life

programme.title: Gloves Off
programme.desc: Following his boxing trainer’s sudden death during his championship fight, Doug has inherited a crumbling debt-ridden gym, packed full of a mixed bag of crazy would-be pugilists.

programme.title: Orgazmo

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Ex-jailbirds Eddie and Paul are on parole and working in a New York diner. Their lives are a dead end. That is, until English lawyer Katherine Rookwood walks into the diner with an offer they can't refuse. Feat: Sam Rockwell.

programme.title: Homegrown
programme.desc: When the leader of their dope-growing operation gets rubbed out, three inept underlings try to take over. Starring Billy Bob Thornton, Ryan Phillippe, Jamie Lee Curtis and John Lithgow.

programme.title: Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Teenager Rick Stevens has a crush on Nina Pennington. They form a friendship and embark on a rock n' roll journey together while Nina deals with her overbearing boyfriend, Kevin. Starring: Nat Wolff, Selena Gomez, Mary-Louise Parker

programme.title: Employee of the Month
programme.desc: Shocking twists follow after bank manager David Walsh is fired, dumped by his fiancée and shot in the span of a day. Starring : Matt Dillon, Steve Zahn, Christina Applegate. (Comedy/Drama)

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: Baking Up Love
programme.desc: CEO of the Morton Pumpkin Company decides to commemorate the anniversary of the cutest town ever founded with a bake-off. The town sweetheart is expected to win. When her niece is left to stay, winning seems out of reach.

programme.title: The Winning Season: The Winning Season
programme.desc: The story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze and his overdeveloped macho nature in order to re-invent himself as a real man and give a bunch of no-hopers a shot at a WINNING SEASON!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Full House at Northwich Plaza and Bingo Hall
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head into Northwich, Cheshire to investigate a disused bingo hall. Bex braves a lone vigil, which she will never forget as a door seemingly opens on its own.
programme.sub-title: Full House at Northwich Plaza and Bingo Hall

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.
programme.sub-title: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Liverpool's Secret Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean delve deep into Woolton Hall, a derelict mansion in Liverpool. They appear to be forced out of the building by an unknown force and it takes its toll on one of the team members.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Night Before The Storm
programme.desc: In this special episode, it's the night before Sean and Bex are joined by their celebrity guest and they check out The Black Horse in Pluckley Village to investigate the paranormal hauntings at the most haunted pub in the UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean investigate a haunting inside a gothic mansion, that is said to be haunted by the former owner of the building.
programme.sub-title: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Blues Haunting at The Winslow Hotel
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and the team head to Liverpool and investigate a very famous hotel, which Everton football club supporters have frequented for over 100 years and it would appear that some of the guests have never checked out.
programme.sub-title: The Blues Haunting at The Winslow Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and Paul, investigate claims of paranormal incidents inside of a haunted inn. Once three separate cottages, will any of the previous residents join the investigation tonight? Or is there something more sinister haunting here?
programme.sub-title: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Witches and Vampires Haunting St James Cemetery
programme.desc: St James Cemetery is set behind Liverpool Cathedral and is claimed to be the worlds most haunted, with the remains of over 58,000 people buried at the location and multiple claims of paranormal sightings.
programme.sub-title: Witches and Vampires Haunting St James Cemetery

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Bex and Sean delve deep into a building that has survived world wars and is home to some very social ghosts. They come face to face with an angry spirit too, and something strange appears to be lurking in the basement.
programme.sub-title: A Social Club for the Paranormal

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Unexpected Haunted Adventure
programme.desc: The team heads to Lydiate Abbey to investigate claims of a ghostly white lady and stumble upon a totally hidden gem deep in the woods, which has its own spirits haunting.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome
programme.desc: The team head to Speke Airport to investigate claims that some of the aircraft located there have ghostly passengers still aboard, waiting to take flight.
programme.sub-title: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Bump In The Bingo Hall
programme.desc: The team head out to Blackpool for a day out at the seaside that they will never forget. Investigating one of Blackpool's iconic buildings The Empire Bingo Hall. Many famous acts have played here and it seems that some may have never left.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Hidden in St Helens, is a museum that is home to demonic and dark entities trapped inside of vehicles.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head to Sefton and investigate a police station connected to the murderous Jack The Ripper. Was James Maybrick really the Ripper? Did his wife poison him?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Blackpool is iconic for ghosts and tonight, Sean and Bex investigate a horror attraction which appears to have attracted some very real spirits that are spooking its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Hotel of Horror
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension heads to Halewood and investigates the Wellington Hotel, believed to be a hive of paranormal activity. Will they uncover what is haunting this public house?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Who is There?
programme.desc: Could a cemetery be haunted? The team come head out to find out and contact restless souls that have been haunting the graveyard.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a scorched house in Derbyshire, a quiet farm in Cheshire and a one-bedroom house in London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look at properties in Canterbury, St. Helens and Norfolk.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a one-bedroom flat in London, a mid-terrace in Nottingham and a property in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 21
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit a property in Stockport near Manchester to see if can make a profit, a neglected house in Derbyshire which benefits from spectacular views, and a bungalow in Kent which has suffered severe water damage.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: We visit a picturesque cottage in Newquay that draws plenty of attention at auction. In Stockport, there's an office block up for auction which could be great and in Kent, there's a three bedroom end terrace house in a good area.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cottage in Cheshire which is lacking in something; a lovely property in Kent and a house in Devon that seems too cheap to be true.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Wales, North London and Liverpool.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a burnt out three bedroomed house in Salford, a four bed semi detached house in London and in a tiny property in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a two bed terrace in Bolton, £95K could get you an amazing air raid shelter in Aldershot, Hampshire and last seen 2 years ago this plot of land in Crewkerne which now has a dream house built on it.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 2
programme.desc: Lucy & Martin Roberts visit a studio flat in Chelsea, London. They travel to Manchester to see an end of terrace in need of refurbishment, and then it's on to Plymouth where a house has art deco features and a bargain basement!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look at a cottage in Cheshire and a flat in Stoke.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 3
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a grand farm house worth getting excited about in Cheshire, in Dorset there's an old wooden chapel praying for help from above and in Stoke there's a spacious semi with no space.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 7
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a detached property in Cheadle, revisit a house in London a year after we first saw it and a flat in Truro.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a damp property in Devon, a London flat with an exhibit for the antiques road show and a house in Leicester with surprising views out the back.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 19
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in the peak district with a few layout issues, a property in Hertfordshire with a very long, narrow garden and revisit a property they first looked at three years ago to see how much it has changed.

programme.title: Penny Serenade
programme.desc: A couple's big dreams give way to a life full of unexpected sadness and unexpected joy.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: The Centerfold Girls
programme.desc: A depraved religious fanatic sets out to punish all the "immoral" women who have posed for the center-fold of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Witchcraft
programme.desc: Gary (David Hasselhoff) and Leslie visit a quiet island to conduct research on witchcraft. Jane Brooks (Linda Blair) and family are looking to buy a local mansion. Unable to leave the island, they are subjected to the sadism of an evil witch.

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: Creepshow 2
programme.desc: Three more bone-chilling tales that include a vengeful wooden Native American, a monstrous blob in a lake, and a hitchhiker who wants revenge and will not die. Starring:George Kennedy, Lois Chiles, Domenick John

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods.

programme.title: Munchies
programme.desc: Simon Watterman, a space archaeologist, discovers the "Munchies" in a cave in Peru. Cecil Watterman, Simon's evil twin brother and snack food entrepreneur, kidnaps the creature.

programme.title: Tom Brown's School Days
programme.desc: Cedric Hardwicke and Freddie Bartholomew star in this adaptation of Thomas Hughes famous novel. To say this film has an impressive pedigree is an understatement!

programme.title: Hunter: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: Mysterious tape recordings accusing a company of illegally dumping toxic waste seem like a prank until Hunter and McCall find that someone is willing to kill to conceal the truth.
programme.sub-title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

programme.title: Hunter: Honorable Profession
programme.desc: When Hunter confronts the police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman critically wounded in the line of duty, the pair heads to Chinatown.

programme.title: Hunter: Payback
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall try to solve a bank robbery and murder while coping with the double and triple-crossing schemes of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.

programme.title: Hunter: Partners
programme.desc: When the husband of a policewoman is murdered, evidence of wife abuse makes Hunter and McCall suspect the woman's patrol partner who knew about the beatings.

programme.title: Hunter: The Pit
programme.desc: A veteran police dispatcher is blackmailed into undermining Hunter's and McCall's investigation of a multimillion-dollar gold robbery when her son is kidnapped.

programme.title: Hunter: City Under Siege - Part 1
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through a Los Angeles suburb where a crime wave and backlash vigilantism threaten to tear the community apart.

programme.title: Hunter: City Under Siege - Part 2
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through a Los Angeles suburb where a crime wave and backlash vigilantism threaten to tear the community apart.

programme.title: Hunter: City Under Siege - Part 3
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through a Los Angeles suburb where a crime wave and backlash vigilantism threaten to tear the community apart.

programme.title: Hunter: Me, Myself & Die
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall learn that a bizarre murder is a biochemist's effort to conceal the killing of a woman's husband in order to win her.

programme.title: Hunter: Informant
programme.desc: Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury and is sent to jail, as a convicted murderer stalks the only witness against him -- Hunter's informant.

programme.title: Hunter: Bloodline
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall follow a trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: Hunter: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: As Hunter and McCall investigate a string of jewelry store robberies, they pursue the thieves in an alley and McCall shoots a man who may be innocent.

programme.title: Hunter: Code 3
programme.desc: McCall can't believe that a doctor, a pregnant trauma specialist who once treated her, began drinking again and killed herself by driving off a cliff.

programme.title: Hunter: Ring of Honor
programme.desc: Sammy Davis, Jr. ("Ocean's 11") guest stars as a boxing trainer who helps McCall investigate a series of murders in the world of prize fighting.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the murders of teenage prostitutes and the prime suspect is a sadistic killer who impersonates a cop.

programme.title: Hunter: Last Run
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall follow a string of torture murders to a money laundering ring and an undercover cop looking for his daughter.

programme.title: Hunter: The Return of Whitecloud
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an art gallery owner involved in illegal sales of indigenous artifacts and find themselves drawn into the world of Native American politics.

programme.title: Hunter: On Air
programme.desc: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful radio host when he goes undercover to catch a killer who threatens the men in her life.

programme.title: Hunter: Shillelagh
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall are assigned to protect the Irish patriot brother of Devane's new lady friend, but find the man is the assassin instead of the intended victim.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato finds out how fast cricketer Shane Warne is on a track. Jonny Smith and Tom Ford compare diesel and petrol Minis, and Tiff compares the new Subaru Impreza to a previous version.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson pits the brand new Audi S5 against the BMW 335i. Then, England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim heads to London to investigate the new craze of car share clubs; Jason Plato meets up with celebrity chef James Martin, whose enviable car collection includes a busted Formula One.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell drives the Lamborghini Gallardo Superleggera; DJ Christian O'Connell is challenged to a stunt driving routine.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Iwan Thomas accepts a stunt challenge from world-famous precision driver Russ Swift.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw visits Pit Start, a fully-stocked repair shop with a twist — there are no mechanics.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato test two roadsters on the track; Tom Ford tests the sexy new Maserati GranTurismo coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Car nut Tim Shaw joins the team to tackle ways to spend less money on fuel; Tom tests Ford's new Kuga SUV; Jonny sees if a car is actually worth more as scrap than as a functional vehicle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford visits billionaire Bernie Ecclestone's sprawling garage to explore his rare collection before he auctions off more than 50 of these unique models.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith hunts down three cars that fall within budget for parents on their first year of motoring.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Olympic rowing gold medalist Matthew Pinsent tests sports cars. Tim tries to discover if manufacturers' economy claims transfer to the real world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom and Jonny enter the grueling Exeter Trial, a 24-hour off-road driving event that has been held for 100 years, in an old Volkswagen Beetle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff gets to drive the Aston Martin DBS, the latest James Bond car; Jonny Smith embarks on a 600-mile transcontinental trip to test out the world's first diesel Grand Tourer.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim investigates the government's new scrappage system that promises cash in exchange for bangers; Tiff and Jason race a pair of double-decker buses.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw takes Renault to task for overcharging customers; Tiff runs a shootout between two coupes; Vicki spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim uncovers just how many motorists don't check their oil.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato races two fast estates; Tom Ford tests the latest Honda Accord and assists the HM Plant Honda Superbike Team along the way.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato meets Paul Vickery, captain of the England rugby team; Tom Ford journeys to the Arctic to test the Volvo XC70 in extreme conditions; Tiff Needell tests out the Lexus IS-F.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out how quick the police are on a racing track. Then, Jonny loads up some small economy cars to find out of they can still climb one of Britain's biggest hills.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny tries to find some fine coupes for less than £1,500.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Paddy McGuinness returns to take his motorbike test; Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shootout; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Mini's chic rival, the Fiat 500; "Fifth Gear" tests whether fuel additives really work by scientifically analyzing four different brands.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the new 207 GTi is as exhilarating to drive as the 20-year-old hot hatch grandmaster, the 205GTi.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson returns to Anglesey for more shootouts; Tom Ford visits Spain to drive the new Land Cruiser; Jason Plato drives the Mercedes CLK63 Black.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason face off on an enormous off-road playground; Tim investigates the cratered world of potholes.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson attends a shootout between two chic superminis: the BMW Mini One and the Fiat 500.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this special edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki finds out which iconic TV car is fastest: General Lee from "The Dukes of Hazzard" or the Gran Torino from "Starsky and Hutch."

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian and motorbike fanatic Ross Noble gets to play Evel Knievel with his hero Dougie Lampkin, a prolific stunt rider.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes two of Ford's fastest and most iconic hot hatches to Anglesey; Tom Ford volunteers to aid mountain rescue teams equipped with Hummer H3s.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the season's first episode, Tim Shaw tests whether having an old banger is actually cheaper than a new car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jonny devise some driving challenges to find out which of four new hot hatches is the best; Jason heads to the continent to test drive the new Audi TT-RS.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the last episode of the season, Tiff tests a Caterham Roadsport 175 by driving essential medical supplies around the country; Tom drives SEAT's new family saloon; Jason enjoys the monstrous Lamborghini LP670-4 Super Veloce.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Thrills
programme.desc: The intimate thoughts of a twisted mind would be enough to stun a community and horrify the world. But thoughts alone may not be enough to turn someone into a killer. This is a bizarre journey into the world of women who kill for twisted thrills.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Anger, fear and despair are basic human emotions. But when these emotions are coupled with a broken mind, a perfect storm is created. Teetering on the edge of unbalance, these women resort to murder when pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Possessions
programme.desc: A grandmother caring for her grandchildren, a young girl in love with a boy, and a mother protecting her son are consumed with intense love. But when that love is threatened, they find it too much to bear and take measures into their own hands.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: These women burn madly with anger so deep they'll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn on the ones they love? Find out as we explore the reasons for a lover's revenge.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Some killers are so troubled that their actions are almost impossible to comprehend. Welcome to the shadow land of the insane and psychopathic as we enter the haunting world of the disturbed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill For Cash
programme.desc: Money is a strong motivator. It can be used for good. It can be used for evil. It can be the driving force behind murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: An Inconvenient Marriage
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion; it can drive women to unthinkable crimes of passion. Hate however, is love's gloomy shadow, and it can drive women into the darkest corners of their mind.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organization: the Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.desc: The team investigate a sprawling venue where apparitions, noises, and an unsavoury entity have been reported. Sara has an experience she won't forget. Dale gets a headache. And the entire team is mystified by a particular incident that keeps occurring.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Psychic for the Defense
programme.desc: Investigators are perplexed when a gagged and mutilated body washes up on a Florida beach. The FBI is called in to help crack the gruesome case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In small town Ohio, a respected state trooper reports his wife missing. Then he tells the police she’s run off with a secret lover. But has she?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "That's so freaky!"
programme.desc: In this episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to Stockport to investigate stories of shadow figures, phantom voices, mysterious figures, and more. Will they encounter anything paranormal?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Did someone just talk?"
programme.desc: The team head to Leeds to investigate a fascinating, historical building. With reports of unexplained footsteps, people being touched, and an apparition of a former staff member, the AYH team have a lot to investigate.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who whistled then?
programme.desc: A haunted market venue with a dark past is investigated by the team. A distressed Dale has to leave a vigil, two team members see a dark shape, and there’s a phantom whistler. But who is put in charge of this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Stay calm, stay calm!"
programme.desc: A journey south to the county of Suffolk sees the AYH team investigating a building that has had multiple uses in its colourful history. With reports of a playful spirit and possible poltergeist activity, Sara and Jane get the fright of their lives.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something behind me!
programme.desc: The team are back once again. This episode sees the intrepid team joined by two guest investigators - Kevin Ling and Michael Roberts - as they investigate a reputedly haunted venue bigger than most!

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "The heebie-jeebies!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team head northwest in this episode, and to a venue that counts reports of a mysterious black shape, and phantom screams as just two of the many incidents reported there. What will the team encounter?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Hello? I am here!"
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVE. Sara, Phil, and the rest of the Are You Haunted team travel to North Yorkshire, to investigate a venue for the very first time. Among the incidents here are reports of male and female apparitions, doors opening and closing, and much more.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: An Eye For An Eye

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Cold Blooded Charmer

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Natural Born Killer
programme.desc: A daughter moves to a small town to be closer to her family only to lose them to a brutal killer.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Deadly Messiah

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Man Who Married Too Much

programme.sub-title: The Man Who Married Too Much

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Conman Casanova
programme.desc: A mysterious conman targets beautiful women through an online dating service, plying his charms to win their affections, then robbing them blind.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Toybox Torturer

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Lethal Lover

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Corridor Killer

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Thrill Killer
programme.desc: A Charles Manson copycat and his henchmen stage home invasions and plot a massacre on Valentine's Day for their own sadistic pleasure

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Hunting Humans
programme.desc: When a series of strange disappearances and murders plague a rural community in Northern California, police wonder whether a serial killer is at large. What they discover is a pair of hunters who have grown tired of their animal prey

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Psycho Sailor
programme.desc: A beloved sister and mother is found dead in the icy waters of the Rouge River in Dearborn Heights, MI. Police form a task force to bring down the man who strangled her. In a difficult twist, the killer may be closer to the case than police think

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Trained To Kill

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Devil in the Woods

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Floods

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Pandemics
programme.desc: With an ever more mobile world population, potentially growing in size to 11 billion people by the next century, public health experts agree that the possibility of a cataclysmic disease is more likely now than ever before.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Hurricanes
programme.desc: With a combination of torrential rain, powerful winds, and devastating storm surges, Hurricanes are among Mother Nature’s most calamitous natural disasters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Iceland: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: George meets President of Iceland Ólafur Grímsson who spearheaded use of geothermal power; visits Blue Lagoon and geysers; explores volcanically active Haimaey Island and climbs an iceberg calving off the glaciers at Vatnajokull Lagoon.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Avalanches
programme.desc: Whenever there is unstable snow and gravity, gravity always wins. George travels to the Rocky Mountains to learn about how to stay alive in the back country.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water
programme.desc: In this episode, George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids, a flooded cave, and even in the ocean surrounded by massive Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Blizzards
programme.desc: Winter weather can be even more dangerous than thunderstorms and where else to explore the big chill than at the summit of Mount Washington which has the reputation as being the place with the "Worst weather in the world".

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.
programme.sub-title: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Volcanoes
programme.desc: Volcanoes occupy a special place in our imagination. Stories of the destruction of the ancient Roman city of Pompeii continue to fascinate, while terrifying visions of exploding fire and molten rock play a key part in our nightmares.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Earthquakes
programme.desc: Deadly, highly destructive and impossible to predict the Earthquake is perhaps one of Mother Nature's most terrifying forces. They flatten entire cities, create mass homelessness, and take thousands of lives. Earthquakes are truly deadly disasters.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tsunamis
programme.desc: In Japanese, Tsunami translates to “harbour wave.” They are unleashed when a major disturbance occurs underwater, creating a series of enormous, deadly swells.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Drought
programme.desc: Most parts of the world are liable to the horrors brought by lack of water. In the United States only hurricanes bring about more economic hardships. It is not only a lack of rain and high temperatures that causes drought.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Cyclones
programme.desc: An intense area of low pressure that forms over warm tropical waters, tropical cyclones are responsible for some of the most catastrophic extreme weather events. Their deadly winds and torrential rain wreak destruction on an unprecedented scale.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Slow Loris
programme.desc: Nick travels to the depths of the Bornean jungle to find the only poisonous primate in the world; the Slow Loris. It looks like a cuddly toy, but it carries a poison that can prove fatal.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Horseshoe Crab
programme.desc: The horseshoe crab has been around for nearly half a billion years, making it one of the oldest creatures on the planet. Nick wants to find out what the living fossil has been doing right for so long.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Giant Anteater
programme.desc: Luck is on Nick's side as he goes in search of the awkward middle child of anteaters, the tamandua. Borrowing characteristics from its brothers, the tamandua appears to have an identity crisis.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Pygmy Sloth
programme.desc: Nicks heads to a group of desert islands in Panama where strange things have been happening to the animals. He hangs out with a pygmy sloth and discovers a species of frog with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Blood Squirting Lizard
programme.desc: Nick heads to cowboy country, southeast Arizona, in search of the horned lizard – a reptile with an amazing trick up its spiny sleeve.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Amazonian Vampire Fish
programme.desc: A blood-sucking vampire lives in the waters of the Amazon, one with a macabre reputation. The candiru is a tiny catfish that has been known to swim up the human urethra.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Pink Fairy Armadillo
programme.desc: Nick goes looking for the world's smallest armadillo, it lives in the sandy dunes of Western Argentina, and is very rarely seen even by those who live there.

programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where venomous creatures roam.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Bites
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with the fiercest of bites roam.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Stealth
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where the kings and queens of stealth lurk.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Tusk and Horns
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with weapons carved from bone and ivory stalk the open plains.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Beaks and Talons
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where masters of the sky sweep from above with their fierce beaks and razor sharp talons.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Pack Tectics
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where packs, troops and prides of predators roam, finding safety and strength in numbers.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Camouflage
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where the deadliest of predators often remain unseen.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Disease
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where disease may just be the deadliest weapon of all.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Tusk and Horns
